name: PhenixFIN Corp
business: PhenixFIN Corp is an internally-managed non-diversified closed-end management investment company that has elected to be regulated as a business development company (BDC). It primarily makes loans and equity investments in privately-held companies with enterprise values between $25 million and $250 million. Its investment objective is to generate current income and capital appreciation.

exposures.sentence: NSG, headquartered in Elba, AL, is a specialty underwriter of property, casualty, annuities, life, accident and health insurance, primarily in the Southeastern US.
